description_long: This is an old, industrial-style front-loading washing machine with a heavily weathered and rusted exterior. The front features a large circular door with a thick metal rim and latch, showing significant corrosion and wear, and a faded red number '2' painted above the door. The body is boxy, constructed from thick metal panels with a mottled, off-white and rust-brown finish, and the sides are plain with visible rust streaks and patches. The rear panel is bolted and features warning labels and a small access hatch, further emphasizing its utilitarian design. The machine sits on two short metal feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to harsh conditions, possibly in an outdoor or industrial urban environment.
description: A heavily rusted, industrial front-loading washing machine with a large circular door and faded paint, showing extensive wear and corrosion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, rusted circular door with a latch, faded number '2', and a small button or indicator on the upper left.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, weathered metal panel with extensive rust and discoloration, no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view with a bolted metal panel, warning labels, a small access hatch, and heavy rusting.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with rust streaks and a plain, weathered surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single round button or indicator is visible on the upper left of the front panel; no other controls or digital displays are visible.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular metal door with a thick rim and visible latch mechanism.
attribute_drum_visibility: partially; the drum interior is visible through the open door in the front view, but details are obscured by shadows and rust.
